name: Tibia Fracture (Geometry)
pi: Annchristin Andres, Michael Roland, Stefan Diebels
description: Patient-specific tibia mesh from Use Case 1: tibial shaft non-union treated by intramedullary nail diameter change (8mm to 11mm). Three regions: bone, fracture/callus zone, and implant screws. Quadratic tetrahedral elements (C3D10).
